case_title: MARWAH INVESTMENT CORPORATION VS. SPRIM ADVANCED LIFE SCIENCES INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $1,114.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 16052006) AS TO DEFENDANT SPRIM ADVANCED LIFE SCIENCES INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION
